_about.title: Phase 1 — the gold ui-button (the reference control, full G5 bar)
_about.serves: .claude/docs/goals.md §G5 DoD (gold) + the button→demo→/site→A2UI-canvas vertical slice, Phase 1. Gates Phases 2–4.
_about.method: system-decompose, both planes. OUTSIDE-IN = the gold button decomposed into slice groups (foundation seams · behaviour · styling/geometry · contract/doc · verification · governance · packaging) — the structure. INSIDE-OUT = the gold-bar requirements (capabilities/acceptance) anchored to the G5 DoD, independent of the structure so they can contradict it. `hosts` crosses them. The `order`/`dep`/`acceptance`/`gate` keys on each leaf overlay the ordered build plan onto the coverage-clean structure (the gate ignores non-node/action/host keys).
_about.ground_state: G1 (reactive kernel) + G2 (UIElement + typed props: static props/ReactiveProps, reflection+locks, lazy-upgrade [attribute-wins today], attachInternals, this.effect/listen/emit, renderRoot) DONE. G3 mid-build: template CORE (html`` → parts: child/attr/?bool/.prop/@event) shipped, BUT element.ts:182 render() is a void no-op and the engine's render(result,container) is never called by the base — the host commit is unwired (slice s1). No connected()/disconnected() hook, no host.use(). G4 (UIFormElement + traits) NOT built; traits/ is index.ts only. shared/tokens.css is COLOR-ONLY (no --ui-height/font/ind/density, no --space-*). Governance machinery ABSENT: no component rubric (.claude/docs/rubrics has kernel/element/template), no frontmatter contract schema (component-api-contract.json absent), no contract↔props trip-wire probe, no component-reviewer agent (.claude/agents has only the three leads). Browser-truth tooling ABSENT: @vitest/browser + Playwright not installed; vitest.config is jsdom-only by design.
_about.decisions: ADR-0003 (single button.css + barrels + host-page), ADR-0004 (button.md frontmatter descriptor), ADR-0005 (lazy-upgrade property-wins) — all proposed, awaiting orchestration-lead accept; build is gated on the packaging/descriptor ADRs. Quality bar = G5-GOLD (defer nothing). camelCase→kebab folding stays deferred (button doesn't exercise it).

_build_legend.tooling-add: needs a devDep / config addition not present today (flagged)
_build_legend.judgment-gate: verified by a reviewer's score, not a script

_first_slice: s1 render-wiring — nothing visual renders until the host commits a returned TemplateResult; it is also the G3 integration-proof DoD. Build it first; it unblocks every visual/behavioural slice.

_predicted_gates.standing: npm run check && npm test  →  green (per slice that touches code: s1,s2,s3,s4,s5,s6,s7,s8,s10,s11,s17)
_predicted_gates.browser: npm run test:browser (NEW script, after s12)  →  Chromium AND WebKit green (s12 trivial, s13 anti-vacuous geometry/forced-colors)
_predicted_gates.score: component-reviewer scores COMPOSE ≥4 AND REALIZE ≥4 (s16 — judgment gate, the G5 promotion gate)
_predicted_gates.size: npm run size  →  ui-button marginal within budget; tree-shake clean (s17)

nodes.label: render-wiring — UIElement render effect commits a returned TemplateResult into renderRoot
nodes.dep: G2 element + G3 template core (both present)
nodes.acceptance: a throwaway UIElement subclass whose render() returns html`` paints into its light-DOM root; re-render writes only changed holes (the G3 integration-proof DoD). npm run check && npm test green.

nodes.label: connected()/disconnected() overridable hooks on UIElement (called inside the scope)
nodes.acceptance: a subclass's connected() runs after the scope/AbortController open and disconnected() before teardown; a probe asserts ordering + that effects/listeners wired in connected() are scope/abort-owned (zero residue). Tests green.

nodes.label: lazy-upgrade precedence flip to property-wins (ADR-0005) + probe
nodes.acceptance: a pre-upgrade .prop= assignment beats a conflicting initial attribute at connect; a property-wins probe is green AND the G2 reflect/upgrade suite (element-upgrade, element-attrs, props-reflect) stays green (no loop regression).

nodes.label: pressActivation(host, opts) => release trait in traits/press-activation.ts
nodes.acceptance: Space (keyup; keydown preventDefault scroll) + Enter (keydown) synthesize a click; disabled => inert (no click, no key handling); release() is idempotent and leaves zero residue. Invoked directly (no host.use()); one-line upgrade seam to this.use later. Probes green.

nodes.label: controls/button/button.ts — UIElement subclass, variant/size/disabled props, role via internals, click emit, self-define
nodes.acceptance: extends UIElement (NOT UIFormElement); static props variant/size enum + disabled boolean via ReactiveProps (literal-union typed, proven by a @ts-expect-error); role='button' via internals (no host aria); connected() invokes pressActivation; emits native-parity click; self-defines ui-button. CONTENT MODEL (ADR-0006): host-as-grid — the button styles the host and lets the presence-driven :has() grid place the user's light-DOM children (optional leading icon + label); it does NOT render() a wrapper over user content (that would clobber the icon/label). Probes green.

nodes.label: dimensional token ramp in @agent-ui/shared — --ui-{height,font}-{sm,md,lg} + [scale] + [density] multipliers
nodes.acceptance: the Control-band height+font ramp resolves for sm/md/lg; an ancestor [scale] multiplies the frame ramp and [density] multiplies the rhythm (gap) per geometry.md — the two levers the gold px-smoke (s13) asserts. Loaded-first discipline preserved (var falls to no literal floor when present).

nodes.label: single button.css — :where token block + @scope styles block + slotless h/2 geometry + forced-colors
nodes.acceptance: single button.css (ADR-0003): a :where(ui-button) block declares --ui-button-* from --md-sys-color-{family}-{role} roles + the ramp, [size]/[variant] repoint; an @scope (ui-button) block consumes ONLY --ui-button-*; block-size off the ramp, padding-block:0; a forced-colors block keeps the ink. ANATOMY (ADR-0006): host-as-grid with an OPTIONAL leading icon slot via a presence-driven :has() selector (places user light-DOM children, no render() wrapper) — bare-label = slotless 1fr, inline-pad = h/2 (geometry.md, NOT the superseded 2px+ formula); icon+label = auto 1fr, slot edge-pad = ½(h−icon), with column-gap: var(--ui-gap-{size}) (the one density-bearing quantity). Blocks sectioned for the :where() probe.

nodes.label: controls/button/button.md — frontmatter descriptor + body (ADR-0004)
nodes.acceptance: button.md YAML frontmatter records tag/tier/extends/attributes/properties/events/slots/parts/customStates/face/aria/keyboard/geometry/forcedColors; the body is the /site prose. attributes[] mirrors static props.

nodes.label: frontmatter contract schema (replaces component-api-contract.json)
nodes.acceptance: a draft-2020-12 schema for the descriptor frontmatter; a known-good button.md frontmatter validates and a known-bad (missing/typo field) fails. The referential standard the trip-wire (s10) enforces.
nodes.gate: the s10 probe validates a good/bad fixture against it

nodes.label: contract↔props trip-wire probe — button.md frontmatter ≡ finalize(Class)
nodes.acceptance: a probe asserts the frontmatter attributes[] === the live finalize( button) table; a negative control (a drifted/added attribute) FAILS. Parses only the frontmatter fence, ignores the body.

nodes.label: jsdom probes — behaviour + static geometry/token trip-wires
nodes.acceptance: behaviour probes (activation, disabled-inert, click, typed props, light-DOM/internals-aria, zero-residue) + the static geometry/token checks (padding-block==0; edge-pad formula; 0<glyph≤box; every --ui-button-* in :where(); no raw primitive refs). All green.

nodes.label: browser-truth harness — @vitest/browser + Playwright devDep + a browser vitest project (Chromium + WebKit)
nodes.dep: ADD @vitest/browser + playwright devDeps; a second vitest project/config in browser mode; a test:browser script
nodes.acceptance: a trivial browser test mounts ui-button and reads a computed style in BOTH Chromium and WebKit; npm run test:browser exits green. FLAG: this is a new dependency + config — absent today (jsdom-only).

nodes.label: cross-engine geometry/forced-colors smoke (anti-vacuous)
nodes.acceptance: in Chromium AND WebKit, two variants (bare-label + icon+label), anti-vacuous BOTH ways (ADR-0006): [size] sm→md→lg AND [scale] compact→spacious CHANGE the px (frame height + font, via --ui-scale) on BOTH variants; [density] compact→spacious CHANGES the icon↔label gap (--ui-gap) on the icon+label variant AND does NOT change the bare-label FRAME (height + the h/2 pads) — frame-invariance asserted. The forced-colors block keeps the ink. Green in both engines.

nodes.label: COMPOSE/REALIZE component rubric in .claude/docs/rubrics/component.md
nodes.acceptance: two axes (COMPOSE: layer/anatomy/API/composition/coherence; REALIZE: geometry/element/semantics/interaction/fidelity), each dimension typed [gate]/[review], with a gate-to-promote rule (both axes ≥4, zero gate fails) + the bloat dimensions. harness_checks.py rubric exits 0.

nodes.label: component-reviewer subagent in .claude/agents/component-reviewer.md
nodes.dep: agent-author; s14 (the rubric it scores against)
nodes.acceptance: frontmatter has tools:, model:, a description stating a trigger, no enforcement-in-prose; skills:[component-author] preload; verify the installed agent frontmatter keys before authoring. harness_checks.py agent exits 0.

nodes.label: rubric score — component-reviewer scores both axes ≥4 (the G5 promotion gate)
nodes.dep: ALL prior slices (scores the complete button)
nodes.acceptance: the component-reviewer agent reviews ui-button against the rubric + the contract and returns COMPOSE ≥4 AND REALIZE ≥4 with zero gate fails — G5 is declared done.

nodes.label: barrels (components / component-styles / foundation-styles) + tree-shake proof
nodes.dep: s5, s7, s8 (the files exist); ADR-0003
nodes.acceptance: the package exposes the three barrels; importing ui-button drags only it + real deps (npm run size, tree-shake clean); the naming/structure file-set gate accepts {name}.{ts,css,md,test.ts}. The demo HOST PAGE itself is Phase 2 (out of scope here).
nodes.gate: npm run check && npm test && npm run size

actions.label: button renders via html`` into its light-DOM root, end-to-end (G3 integration proof)
behaviour wires at connect and tears down at disconnect (zero residue)
a pre-upgrade property beats an initial attribute (property-wins, ADR-0005)
variant/size literal-union props; role via internals
the dimensional tables exist so rendered px changes across sm/md/lg, [scale], [density]
block-size off the ramp, padding-block:0, slotless h/2 inline-pad
@scope styles consume only --ui-button-*; tokens in :where(); forced-colors survives
the public surface is recorded in button.md frontmatter
the frontmatter validates against the contract schema
the frontmatter attributes ≡ finalize(Class) (the contract↔props trip-wire)
behaviour + static geometry/token invariants are probe-enforced (jsdom)
cross-engine smoke asserts px CHANGES (anti-vacuous) + forced-colors, green in both engines
the COMPOSE/REALIZE rubric exists as the referential standard
the component-reviewer agent exists to score against it
the reviewer scores both axes ≥4 (the G5 promotion gate)
the button is consumable via the barrels, tree-shake clean
